attacking_style: Launches repeated attacks on climbs to force selections, showing willingness to go multiple times rather than a single decisive move. Aggressive climber who attacks from distance rather than waiting for final kilometers.
team_tactics: Primarily used as a high-tempo domestique for team leaders, capable of extended pacemaking on mountain stages. Has experienced team tactical conflicts where teammates in chase groups neutralized his own attacks.
terrain_preference: Climbs suit him best where he can leverage superior climbing strength to force selections. Most effective on stages with multiple ascents allowing repeated acceleration attempts.
vulnerability: Struggles to create decisive gaps even when strongest climber present; companions can mark attacks. Unable to capitalize on superior form when forced into team work role rather than personal ambitions.
key_patterns: Multiple attacks on climbs to split race, aggressive selection-forcing style (2 races)
Strong climbing form but lacks finishing power to drop marked opponents (2 observations)
Sacrifices personal chances for team pacemaking duties, extended tempo work (2 observations)
form_trajectory: unknown: last observation from 2022 showed exceptional domestique form, but 3-year gap and no recent finishing data limits assessment
